messages.text:
Sure! Here’s a flowchart for a simple login page process.

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    A[User opens login page] --> B[User enters username and password]
    B --> C{Credentials valid?}
    C -- Yes --> D[User is redirected to dashboard]
    C -- No --> E[Show error message]
    E --> B
```

This flowchart outlines the steps a user takes when logging in. If you need more details or a specific aspect explained, just let me know! 😊💻
